---
title: "Muhammad Ahmad Hassan"
image: "profile.jpg.jpeg"
links:
  - label: LinkedIn
    url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/mahmadhassan1/"
  - label: GitHub
    url: "https://github.com/"
  - label: Email
    url: "mh24952@essex.ac.uk"
output:
  postcards::trestles
---
 
## Bio

I am a final-year BSc (Hons) Economics and Politics student at the University of Essex. My academic interests focus on understanding how markets function and how political institutions shape economic outcomes.

Beyond my studies, I enjoy reading widely to gain new perspectives on economic and political issues. I also play golf in my free time.

## Education

**University of Essex** | Colchester, UK

Bsc in Economics and Politics | September 2023 - May 2026
